case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s productcatalogservice metrics. Latency.p90 dev=+2.4 and mem dev=+2.4 persist across windows. Traces show high call counts from frontend/recommendationservice. Root cause is productcatalogservice latency.
Productcatalogservice latency.p90 and mem anomalies drive frontend/recommendationservice call spikes. Root cause confirmed by metrics-led hypothesis.
